name: 刺刀（★） | 自由之手
descriptionEn: Relatively unchanged in its design since World War II, the bayonet still retains a place in modern military strategy. Bayonet charges have continued to be effective as recently as the second Gulf War and the war in Afghanistan. It has been painted black and purple, then decorated with a metallic marker.
descriptionZh: 其设计相对于第二次世界大战以来基本没有变化，刺刀在现代军事战略中仍占有一席之地。在最近的第二次海湾战争和阿富汗战争中也榜上有名。 这件武器有黑色与紫色的涂装，再使用金属符号装饰。
